forgotPassword.brandingSubheadline: We'll send you an email with a link to create a new password.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: An email with instructions has been sent. Check your inbox.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Could not send email. Check the address and try again.

resetPassword.brandingSubheadline: Password must contain at least 8 characters with uppercase, number and special character.
resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorMessage: Could not update password. Please try again.

setPassword.title: Choose a password
setPassword.subtitle: You've been invited! Choose a password to complete your account setup.

register.brandingHeadline:
Professional contract management
for modern businesses
register.brandingSubheadline: Get started with a 7-day free trial. No credit card required.
register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start your 7-day free trial
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, number and special character
register.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.errorTooWeak: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one number and one special character
register.errorCaptchaFailed: Security check failed. Please try again.
register.cookieNotice: We only use necessary cookies for authentication.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We have sent you an email to confirm your account. Click the link in the email to complete registration.
checkEmail.spam: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder or wait a few minutes.

auth.headline:
Keep track of customers
and agreements — simply.
auth.subheadline: A CRM built for businesses that take GDPR seriously.
auth.feature1: Full overview of customers and agreements
auth.feature3: Digital signing — OTP, Veriff, Evrotrust and itsme®
auth.cookieNotice: We only use necessary cookies for authentication.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Customers, agreements and activity in one place
dashboard.trialBannerDesc: Start subscription to continue without interruption
dashboard.paymentFailedDesc: Update payment method to avoid interruption
dashboard.incompleteDesc: Complete purchase to activate your account

customers.title: Customers
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, org. no. or city...
customers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this customer?

customerDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this customer?
customerDetail.renewModalInfo: We will create a copy of this agreement with updated dates. The PDF file is copied — signing status is not.
customerDetail.signingModalInfo: A signing link will be created and sent to the recipient by email.
customerDetail.signingModalEmailHint: The link will be sent automatically to this address. Change it if someone else should sign.
customerDetail.signingLinkInfo: Share this link with the recipient:
customerDetail.signingError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

agreements.title: Agreements
agreements.noResults: No agreements match the selected filter.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Archived and historical agreements
archive.count: {count, plural, one {# archived agreement} other {# archived agreements}}
archive.restoreConfirm: Restore this agreement? It will be moved back to the agreements list.

templates.title: Agreement templates
templates.subtitle: Create templates with rich text and merge fields that are filled in automatically.
templates.mergeFieldsDesc: These are automatically replaced with the correct values when you use the template on an agreement.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first agreement template to get started.
templates.editorContentPlaceholder: Write the agreement content here. Use merge fields in the toolbar to insert dynamic values...
templates.mergeFieldsBoxDesc: Write the merge fields directly in the text, or click a button in the toolbar above the content field. When you generate a PDF from an agreement, the fields are automatically replaced with the correct values from the customer and agreement.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: Name displayed to other users on the account.
settings.userLimitReached: This account has reached the limit of {max} users (1 admin + 4 members). Remove a user to invite someone new.
settings.userLimitReachedApi: The 5-user limit has been reached. Remove a user first.
settings.accessOwnOnlyTitle: Own customers only — click to grant full access
settings.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the account?
settings.makeAdminConfirm: Transfer admin role to {name}? You will become a regular user.
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose which email notifications you want to receive.
settings.notifExpiringDesc: Get notified 2 weeks and 1 week before an agreement you are responsible for expires
settings.notifNoActiveDesc: Get notified when a customer you are responsible for no longer has active agreements
settings.notifTrialDesc: Get notified 2 weeks and 1 week before the trial period ends
settings.notifPaymentDesc: Get notified if a payment fails
settings.subscriptionPastDue: Payment failed — update your payment method.
settings.signingCreditsDesc: Used for digital signing. OTP = 1, Veriff = 2, QES = 3 credits.
settings.signingCreditsMethodInfo: Credit usage: OTP = 1 credit, Veriff = 2 credits, QES = 3 credits.
settings.autoTopupDesc: Automatically purchase 20 signing credits (NOK 579) when balance reaches 1.
settings.aiDesc: Configure the AI assistant for this account.
settings.aiEnableDesc: The assistant helps users with questions, guidance and agreement drafts. In full context, customer names and agreement data are processed by Anthropic API (US).
settings.aiDataWarning: ⚠ AI assistant is enabled. In full context, data may be sent to Anthropic API (US). Make sure this is covered in your privacy policy.
settings.aiDashboardWidgetDesc: Shows 3 AI-generated suggestions at the top of the dashboard based on customers and agreements.
settings.categoryDesc: Manage categories for your agreements. Predefined ones can be deleted if not needed.
settings.privacyDesc: Read about how Pactiva processes personal data.
settings.signingSettingsDesc: Set the default signing method for your account. Can be overridden per agreement.
settings.methodOtpEmailDesc: Signatory receives a one-time code (OTP) by email and confirms identity by entering it.
settings.methodOtpEmailUsage: Standard business agreements, NDAs, service agreements, internal documents
settings.methodVeriffDesc: Identity verified via biometric check of passport/driving licence and facial recognition (Veriff).
settings.methodVeriffUsage: Agreements requiring stronger identity verification, e.g. financial services
settings.methodEvrotrustLevel: QES — Qualified Electronic Signature (highest eIDAS level)
settings.methodEvrotrustDesc: Signature with qualified certificate from an EU-approved trust service provider. Legally equivalent to handwritten signature across the EU.
settings.methodEvrotrustUsage: Legally sensitive documents, real estate, public contracts, financial agreements
settings.methodItsmeDesc: Signature via the itsme® app, a Belgian/Dutch approved digital identity solution.
settings.methodItsmeUsage: Same use cases as QES. Available in Belgium and the Netherlands

slideOver.autoEndDateHint: End date calculated automatically · Preview content before saving
slideOver.pdfWillBeGenerated: A PDF will be generated from the template and replace any existing file
slideOver.fileRemovedNote: The file will be removed when you save.

excelImport.title: Import customers from Excel
excelImport.dropzone: Drag and drop an Excel file here
excelImport.columnsTitle: Expected column names in the Excel file:
excelImport.columnsDesc: Name (required) · Email · Phone · Org. no. · Address · Postal code · City
excelImport.columnsEnglish: Column names are recognized in English, Norwegian, and all other supported languages
excelImport.noValidRows: No valid rows found. Make sure the file has a Name column.
excelImport.duplicateHint: These customers may already exist. Check the box to import anyway.

assistant.title: Pactiva Assistant
assistant.contextLimitedInfo: Limited context — statistics only, no personal data
assistant.contextFullInfo: Full context — assistant can see customer names and agreements
assistant.welcome: Hi! How can I help you?
assistant.notEnabledAdmin: Go to Settings → AI assistant to enable it.
assistant.notEnabledMember: Ask your administrator to enable the AI assistant in Settings.
assistant.suggested1: How do I create a new agreement?
assistant.suggested2: Help me write a service agreement

onboarding.title: Get started with Pactiva
onboarding.subtitle: Select your country to set up your account.
onboarding.countryHint: Sets the default country for your account.
